content_hints.description: Very few members of the Xanathar Guild have access to the beholder’s secret lair. If the characters want to get there, the following factions know where it is and can help them find it.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see the oppressive darkness of the Xanathar Lair, the air thick with the stench of decay and stagnant water. Patches of sickly blue-green bioluminescent fungus cling to the damp walls, casting an eerie, dim light upon the stone steps before you. Dozens of small, gleaming eyes watch you from the shadows below.

npcs.name: Nar’l Xibrindas
npcs.role: advisor Nar’l Xibrindas, who uses sending spells to transmit intelligence to his drow brethren.

hazards.name: Slippery steps (Dexterity save or fall prone)

event_triggers: On entry: A small, gelatinous creature with a single eye blinks at you from a ledge, then scurries into the darkness. You have been spotted.

content_hints.description: Xanathar’s lair is an ancient dungeon complex originally built by Netherese wizards and expanded by beholders over time, connecting to the subterranean town of Skullport by way of a tunnel (area X4). A secret staircase (area X1) gives access to Waterdeep’s sewers.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see an ancient dungeon complex, built by Netherese wizards and expanded by beholders over time. A secret staircase offers access to Waterdeep’s sewers, and tunnels connect to the subterranean town of Skullport.

npcs.name: Nar’l Xibrindas
npcs.role: advisor Nar’l Xibrindas, who uses sending spells to transmit intelligence to his drow brethren.

content_hints.description: The Zhents in black armor sit around a stone dining table, playing Three-Dragon Ante. Eight moth-eaten banners hang from the walls, each bearing an arcane sigil representing a different school of magic.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see crude barricades of overturned tables and salvaged doors blocking the passage ahead. Behind them, hulking figures crouch in the torchlight, rolling knucklebones across a flat stone with low, guttural laughter. The air smells of unwashed fur, rancid meat, and the smoke of a guttering torch jammed into a skull mounted on the barricade.
event_triggers: On combat: The bugbear chief blows a horn. Reinforcements arrive from Room 4 in 3 rounds if not stopped.

content_hints.description: Xanathar's Lair is a room containing three Zhents in black armor seated around a stone dining table, playing Three-Dragon Ante. Eight moth-eaten banners hang from the walls, each bearing an arcane sigil representing one of the eight schools of magic.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see iron cages hanging from the ceiling by rusted chains, swaying gently, each holding a slumped figure. The sounds they make are the worst part—quiet weeping, the dry rasp of labored breathing, and from one cage, a soft, broken laugh that does not stop.
event_triggers: On rescue: Floon warns that Xanathar's throne room is ahead and begs the party to leave before the beholder notices.

content_hints.description: Xanathar Lair is the beholder crime lord of Waterdeep.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see shelves lining every wall, packed with colorful, leather-bound books. The air is thick with the earthy scent of old books, and you notice the faint sweetness of aged spirits leaking from a cracked cask.

hazards.name: Glyph of Warding on owlbear pedestal

content_hints.description: Xanathar's Lair is a room containing three Zhents in black armor seated around a stone dining table, playing Three-Dragon Ante. Eight moth-eaten banners hang from the walls, each bearing an arcane sigil representing one of the eight schools of magic.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see a cellar complex under a powdered wig shop in the Trades Ward, Dandymops, closed and locked with an iron gate.

hazards.name: Pit walls (DC 15 Athletics to climb out)

event_triggers: On entry: Iron gates slam shut. A booming voice echoes: 'NEW CHALLENGERS! XANATHAR SEES ALL!'

content_hints.description: Xanathar's Lair is a room containing three Zhents in black armor seated around a stone dining table, playing Three-Dragon Ante. Eight moth-eaten banners hang from the walls, each bearing an arcane sigil representing one of the eight schools of magic.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see a circular chamber dominated by an enormous glass tank that fills the room from wall to wall. The water inside is crystal clear, lit from below in soft blue and gold, and at its center a single goldfish drifts in lazy circles among miniature castles, tiny sunken ships, and ceramic divers frozen in mid-swim. The water hums faintly with the vibration of protective magic.

hazards.name: Alarm ward on fish tank (alerts Xanathar immediately)

event_triggers: On Sylgar threatened: Xanathar abandons all other priorities. Every creature in the lair converges on this room within 2 rounds.

content_hints.description: The hideout of the Xanathar Guild operatives who snatched up Floon is deep in the city’s labyrinthine sewers. At every location where characters must make a decision about which direction to go, a symbol scrawled in yellow chalk—a stylized representation of Xanathar—is marked next to the tunnel that leads in the right direction.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see a cavern opening into a vast dome of natural stone, its ceiling crusted with stalactites that drip into shallow pools scattered across the floor. The air is cold, still, and thick with a pressure you feel behind your eyes.

npcs.name: Grum’shar
npcs.role: The boss of this hideout is a half-orc named Grum’shar.

loot.name: Xanathar's Hoard (2,500 gp in mixed coin)

event_triggers: On entry: 'Ah. Visitors. Xanathar sees you. Xanathar sees everything. You are here about the gold, yes? Everyone is here about the gold. Xanathar finds this tiresome.'
On Sylgar mentioned: Xanathar's eyestalks all focus on the speaker simultaneously. 'You know about Sylgar? WHO TOLD YOU ABOUT SYLGAR?'
On defeat: The lair begins to collapse as Xanathar's death throes destabilize the cavern. 3 rounds to escape.

content_hints.description: The area is a chamber where characters descending from Zardoz Zord’s cabin arrive, featuring a circular metal hatch that can be opened by turning its valve wheel. Below this hatch is a metal ladder descending to a steel tube, granting access to area U1 on the Scarlet Marpenoth.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see the damp, earthy smell of the Mud Flats, a mucky beach where clam diggers and fishers tread. The air is thick with the scent of brine and decay, and you hear the faint, muffled cry of gulls somewhere above the waterline.

hazards.name: Strong current (Strength save or swept downstream)

event_triggers: On escape during collapse: The boat ride through the sewers is a harrowing 2-minute sprint against falling stone and rising water.
